case_title: ZHENG, CINDY et al vs. CATUNGAL, RONALD et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHENG, CINDY ZHENG, TONG MA, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT CATUNGAL, RONALD DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-03-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-01-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-14-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-03-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANTS. HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
